prose: The HOMO-LUMO gap of pyridine was calculated in the gas phase using DFT at the B3LYP functional with the def2-TZVP basis set (tier `standard`, density fitting active) in PySCF. The SCF procedure converged within 10 cycles. The resultant gap is 6.13981 eV. All integrity checks passed, and no warnings were reported. The live result log can be inspected at its original output location for transparency.
